---
description: "Implement one Phase 1 Core Health feature (vitals, activity, nutrition, hydration, goals)"
name: "VibeHealth Phase 1 Builder"
argument-hint: "Phase 1 feature to implement"
agent: "agent"
---
Implement one **Phase 1 — Core Health Tracking** feature from `roadmap.md`.

Scope includes:
- Vitals dashboard and trends/warnings
- Activity tracking
- Nutrition/calorie tracking
- Hydration tracking
- Workout/health goals

Execution requirements:
1. Translate roadmap bullets into explicit acceptance criteria.
2. Implement API/data model/frontend pieces incrementally.
3. Add analytics/aggregations where required (7d/30d/90d).
4. Add or update automated tests.
5. Validate and report what is complete vs. deferred.

If the selected feature has UI/UX design work, run `/Roadmap Frontend Design` before coding.
